textByHash.004c986cf51bf5901c7737bac1c4e31db0b2fe90: Now what do you want to know.
textByHash.185f7e87cf6da7991cacc96c4f3aee058e0f56f1: I doubt that, but go on.
textByHash.1c27f376df00df29ce12e4cae680be72c2c87bfc: Anything else you need to know?
textByHash.1e5d17d6d25f2235a3ab684d1fd6bd552e3e3835: Sounds like this shrine needs a thorough investigation.
textByHash.21f6233e59840bdd836d9d7bde354ad2dc662be3: He was acting a bit strange, like he'd taken a blow to the head or something. At the end of the meeting he announces that he's going to be renovating the shrine just west of the town.
textByHash.27d7ab1268cb1f6d70f8220416c934dca158e663: Like I said, a whelp. And don't 'Sir' me girl, I work for a living.
textByHash.27fc9d73ffd7ea48d6ad3856b86dc476d933185c: I'm going to pretend you didn't say that girl.
textByHash.2b25d8be169c3d57d789357876edd74cadac05d3: Far beyond what's needed for a small village such as this.
textByHash.2cd616dffd638d6da20b4d1af72f5ba2d28ba198: Like I said, a whelp. And don't 'Sir' me boy, I work for a living.
textByHash.3252841eeebdca419adb8291e748b983cde203f8: Well, what's to say. This place is falling apart.
textByHash.37d1eb54cd235f2ba40cbf10cf11a92c0b55cf48: The Fishing Platform happened to it.
textByHash.47aa464b55c146722acaa13318ded464c64d4ed4: They could be I suppose, but I'd rather you made sure.
textByHash.4907a17f2ab4a115779dcd27a3f48cd3cbabef02: When you introduce a large scale operation like the Fishing Platform, it takes away the business from the little guy.
textByHash.55417b461510c90495a95cf6744eb8a8db6a5888: It has been torn into three pieces. You will need to stick them back together before you can use them.
textByHash.571a4cac886e9d047623d1dc81b2b6a9eb5c52de: Perhaps, but at the end of the day it is what you need. Do you want it or not?
textByHash.59ea8219f3ffa4243e90a26246b0852720205a64: So girl, what have you learned?
textByHash.720b09e094e97a49a72b33b870892b4cf829c59f: Hmm, it might be worth speaking to that priest of Saradomin.
textByHash.78f0654d7e511538a3bfd29acbdab446591a3a51: As well as the mining equipment, he's been bringing in rune essence in large quantities.
textByHash.7afe9e3102faa88a9e35908bcc60e3396e32a2b8: Anything else I can do for you?
textByHash.8026bf52b847bcd743269d7f98cf53c023091069: What do you want to know?
textByHash.8693b0e66594ab17b4be2df5b1e39bf341832a14: Well, you'll need to free up space for three items in your backpack first.
textByHash.8888ed8940508dcfa622d19b6fa2bea9c55cfffe: Very careless of you, what? Here, take another, but be careful with this one!
textByHash.8a162dc3287217888bcc77e2e97489a1cfb51eaa: Hmm, fishy you say. Anything else?
textByHash.8c641ca21b66c965737a0a34b615fe5e6ece39ea: That covers about everyone, but don't just limit yourself to those three. Others may have some insight into what's been happening.
textByHash.8fe60fa0e21aa019f5867e9fefcbc676810d36ff: Perhaps. What is it that you need?
textByHash.93ca268f1f02a21053b1255d0e32003e6a84b180: The Mayor called a meeting of the town council. Nothing too strange about that, in and of itself.
textByHash.9e82c72639ee6b278780f43c380236ac79966abd: I see Sir Tiffy still has his fun with the Initiates. Sigh, I asked for a Knight and I get a whelp.
textByHash.a4ddacc80e77322064fcbb5dff2861d0d204c975: He speaks to a lot of the villagers and has a good feel for what's going on in town.
textByHash.a946bb780976fcda98858c421e867918b258c603: Almost overnight Witchaven became a ghost town.
textByHash.acb193b452bb724d1d34202d5204d3c83a952b4d: Finally, speak to Holgart the fisherman. I haven't seen him sailing in a while. That is definitely a bit off.
textByHash.afc0ab67d4da07de7e4d52b4388e15dbe26aa225: So boy, what have you learned?
textByHash.bab60e3ed99c6375993d5ca4b30b137217b9cc8f: Hmm. There are only three people I recommend speaking to.
textByHash.bef31cb1ee22a3ee62190c8fac89877c21aae508: Next, speak to Brother Maledict at the church.
textByHash.bf74f7f19b5e744b6a5567b423c4d226e2fe1591: Hmm, it can't be a coincidence that the Mayor is 'renovating' the shrine. He must be preparing to break the Mother Mallum free.
textByHash.c29c47ed2ee659d92b6d438ec75c05278a75c2a2: Because you seek the last page of Maledict's holy book. It is right here for you.
textByHash.c8d2cecf2bf301b267937b213255a1b1fdbc379d: Well, I started to notice something about three weeks ago.
textByHash.cca86688f3af73816dabe7f0a5b53174913f2218: That's an awful big something girl.
textByHash.d72d3f374e769ca81f3d58990e6d3ecf9c3ab154: Run down? Hah! This place used to be a bustling hive of industry.
textByHash.d7cd1567d12550773483f8f85db39280eacf715e: Yes, some of the villagers have been disappearing overnight and reappearing the next day in a dazed and confused state.
textByHash.d986cb2614b5550a6d431863e18a41665a290966: See if he's got any more light to shed on this.
textByHash.da1268d66fd634bfeb64c8baf151961020b7c3ff: I recommend taking a good look down there - see if anything is amiss.
textByHash.e62bc34d2864ac1310d183a467863f9a0ccd1583: Now, I thought that was a bit off since he's about as religious as a dead dog on a termite mound.
textByHash.ea59a0e6d8214ac5273d309076a9d8e10650d005: As well as that, he isn't looking too healthy.
textByHash.ebf6a94e43fa54f3f7775be122878dff142abc37: I could have let that slip, save for the things he's been bringing in.
textByHash.ecffc3531887a177d04b787bf3bf75c5637eb97d: Firstly go speak to Mayor Hobb. He was the first to be acting strangely.
textByHash.f7c33f80f24ba5f21d72cf8567871d0a04a7c54f: Remember, bigger is not always better.
textByHash.f86db39da6ff9ff3226b5d2c85b035c461abe66e: Are you sure this is not some elaborate deception on my part, to fool them?
